findings.note: Hidden parent grouper in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file; analysis subcommands carry real Shorts. Retro candidate: generator template should emit verb-led Shorts for analysis-domain parent groupers.

Visible analysis-subdomain parent grouper in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file; competitors leaf carries the real action description. Retro candidate: generator should derive parent Shorts from the leaf set.

Visible analysis-subdomain parent grouper for content listings in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file; leaves carry the real Shorts. Retro candidate: parent-grouper template should compose from child summaries.
Visible analysis-subdomain parent grouper for keyword-opportunity reads in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file. Retro candidate: hyphen-cased multi-word resources need a richer default than 'Manage <words>'.
Visible analysis-subdomain parent grouper for keyword reads in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file. Retro candidate: read-only resource groupers should land on 'Browse <resource>' over 'Manage <resource>'.

Visible analysis-subdomain parent grouper for recommendation reads/generation in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file. Retro candidate: when a grouper has both read and POST leaves, the Short should hint at both.

Visible analysis-subdomain parent grouper for AI-response artifact reads in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file. Retro candidate: 'responses' is generic; generator could pull the resource description from spec tags.
Visible analysis-subdomain parent grouper for source-opportunity reads in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file. Retro candidate: novel-feature-shaped groupers should pull description from research narrative.

Visible analysis-subdomain parent grouper for citation-source reads in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file. Retro candidate: ambiguous single-word resource names (sources/responses) need disambiguation in the template.
Hidden top-level parent grouper for credential management in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file. Retro candidate: hidden parents shouldn't trigger the tools-audit thin-short rule at all.

Visible api-keys-subdomain parent grouper containing rotation lifecycle leaves in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file. Retro candidate: 'Manage rotate' reads nonsensically; generator should detect single-leaf parents and inline.
Hidden top-level parent grouper for billing settings + x402 top-off in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file. Retro candidate: hidden parents shouldn't trigger the rule.
Hidden top-level customer-types parent grouper in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file; canonical entry is via sites customer-types. Retro candidate: hidden parents shouldn't trigger the rule.

Visible customer-types subdomain parent grouper containing persona CRUD under a customer type in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file. Retro candidate: nested resource groupers should reflect ownership in Short.
Hidden top-level personas parent grouper in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file; canonical entry is via customer-types personas. Retro candidate: hidden duplicate-resource parents shouldn't trigger the rule.
Visible personas-subdomain parent grouper containing question CRUD under a persona in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file. Retro candidate: nested resource groupers should reflect ownership in Short.
Hidden top-level questions parent grouper in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file; canonical entry is via personas questions. Retro candidate: hidden duplicate-resource parents shouldn't trigger the rule.
Visible questions-subdomain parent grouper for question-result reads in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file. Retro candidate: result-shaped groupers should default to 'Read' not 'Manage'.
Hidden top-level signup parent grouper for onboarding-payment flows in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file. Retro candidate: hidden parents shouldn't trigger the rule.

Visible signup-subdomain parent grouper for USDC payment lifecycle in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file. Retro candidate: 'Manage pay usdc' reads as broken English; generator should detect verb-phrase resource names and compose differently.
Visible signup-subdomain parent grouper for onboarding-status reads in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file. Retro candidate: status-shaped reads should default to 'Check' not 'Manage'.
Hidden top-level sites parent grouper in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file; canonical site CRUD lives at this path. Retro candidate: hidden parents shouldn't trigger the rule.
Visible sites-subdomain parent grouper for site-level analysis lifecycle in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file. Retro candidate: lifecycle-shaped groupers (analyze, run, get) need richer defaults.

Visible sites-subdomain parent grouper containing the canonical customer-type CRUD path in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file. Retro candidate: when the same resource appears as both a top-level (hidden) and a nested (visible) grouper, the visible one should get a fuller Short.
Hidden top-level usage parent grouper for usage-metric reads in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file. Retro candidate: hidden parents shouldn't trigger the rule.
Hidden top-level webhooks parent grouper for webhook CRUD + test-fire in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file. Retro candidate: hidden parents shouldn't trigger the rule.

Visible webhooks-subdomain parent grouper for test-fire commands in DO-NOT-EDIT generated file. Retro candidate: 'Manage test' is ambiguous against go test; generator should namespace single-word leaf-resources.
